summary: Frontend-only E2E validation of Phase 1 feature batch: Rockstar CRM (4 tabs), embedded SuperOptimiser (Super & Pension tab on adviser view), SMSF tab, Unified Client Overview (9 tabs), and SimpleClientView (5 tabs, client mode). Result: ALL CORE FLOWS PASS. Zero page errors across all navigation and stress tests. Data consistency verified: Thompson Family net worth $9,610,000 matches on adviser view ($9.61M), SimpleClientView snapshot ($9,610,000), and household map (totalAssets $11.67M, totalDebt $2.06M, Super $3.27M). Only 2 minor/testability issues flagged below.

ui_bugs.issue: The floating 'Review Pack' side panel at top-right of /dashboard overlays the Super tab toolbar, intercepting pointer events for the Add Strategy button. Playwright .click(force=True) does NOT add a strategy; only DOM .click() or closing the Review Pack first works. Real user can still click after dismissing the panel, so not a hard block — but the z-order should be corrected so floating panels don't cover tab-level action bars.

Only 1 of 5 stat cards in Compliance has a data-testid ('stat-overdue'); only 1 of 4 in DocuSign has 'stat-pending'. Visually all cards render correctly, but automated test coverage of stat values is incomplete. Add data-testid to Firm Compliance, Signed, Due<30d, Awaiting (Compliance) and Total Envelopes, Signed, Declined (DocuSign).

design_issues.screen: /dashboard Super tab with Review Pack panel open
issues: Review Pack floating panel at top-right sits above the tab action bar, blocking Add Strategy / Legal Rules / FY selector clicks when open

acceptance_criteria_results.rockstar_crm_4_tabs_no_runtime_errors: PASS — /rockstar-crm loads, all 4 tabs (segments/newsletter/compliance/docusign) switch with 0 page errors
acceptance_criteria_results.segmentations: PASS — 8 preset chips (segment-all, hnw, uhnw, pre_retiree, accumulators, aggressive, conservative, business_owners); clicking 'All' returns 7 clients; New Segment builder opens and accepts input; Target in Campaign button present
acceptance_criteria_results.newsletters: PASS — 5 templates render; Blank campaign starts editor; subject + body fields fill; Preview toggles to rendered view; Save Draft + Send both trigger without error
acceptance_criteria_results.compliance: PASS — stat cards render (Firm %, Signed, Overdue, Due<30d, Awaiting); search='Thompson' filters to 6 rows; Mark-Signed button transitions row; Bulk-Remind button fires toast
acceptance_criteria_results.e_signatures: PASS — New Envelope form → Send creates row with doc=Statement of Advice + recipient=David Thompson + status=sent → Viewed → Signed transitions work; Download + Delete buttons render
acceptance_criteria_results.super_optimiser: PASS — super-optimiser element renders; 6 sliders functional (concessionalExtra, nonConcessional, expectedReturn × 2 strategies); FY selector functional; Legal Rules toggle reveals rules-editor; Add Strategy increases count 2→3 (via JS click; Playwright force-click blocked by Review Pack overlay — see UI bug above); bring-forward + carry-forward checkboxes toggle; comparison table + projection chart render
acceptance_criteria_results.smsf_tab: PASS — loads without runtime error (no ErrorBoundary triggered, no page errors)
acceptance_criteria_results.unified_client_overview_9_tabs: PASS — all 9 tabs (overview, retirement, investments, budget, goals, tax, super, smsf, invoicing) click-through without error
acceptance_criteria_results.data_consistency: PASS — $9.61M net worth appears 3× on adviser Overview header; $9,610,000 exact on SimpleClientView snapshot; Total Assets $11.67M, Total Debt $2.06M, Super $3.27M, Shares $845k — all match CLIENT_DATA.thompson_family
acceptance_criteria_results.simple_client_view_5_tabs_readonly: PASS — /dashboard (app_mode=client) routes to SimpleClientView; 5 tabs load (snapshot/invest/retire/docs/msgs); 0 editable inputs on Investments tab; only navigation/tab buttons present; Messages input + Send persist locally with 'Message sent to your adviser' toast
acceptance_criteria_results.stress_navigation: PASS — rapid navigation across /rockstar-crm → /dashboard (adviser) → /adviser-hub → /dashboard (client) with 0 page errors, 0 chunk-load errors, 0 undefined-variable crashes

action_items: (MEDIUM) Adjust z-index of Review Pack floating panel (or auto-collapse on Super tab entry) so it doesn't overlay tab action bar (Add Strategy / Legal Rules / FY selector)
(LOW) Add data-testid to remaining 4 stat cards in ComplianceTracker and 3 in DocuSignMock for full test coverage
critical_code_review_comments: SuperOptimiser.addStrategy logic is correct; max-10 guard works. Issue is environmental (overlay), not the component.

SimpleClientView excellent implementation — no mutation paths to adviser state; all values derived from CLIENT_DATA.thompson_family via props; 'Your adviser is actively managing this portfolio' banner reinforces read-only contract.
RockstarCRM ErrorBoundary wrapping each tab content is a good defensive pattern.
DocuSignMock end-to-end sent→viewed→signed transition simulates webhook progression well; toasts fire correctly. Safe mock for the 'bring-your-key-later' stub as per user spec.
Data alignment across views is solid — single source (CLIENT_DATA.thompson_family) feeds adviser overview, SimpleClientView, and CRM segmentations.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 10 acceptance criteria PASS; 2 non-blocking minor items)

test_credentials: None — localStorage flags only: wealth_command_compliance_v5=permanent; app_mode=adviser + selected_client={id:'thompson_family'} for adviser flows; app_mode=client (no selected_client) for client flow
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral during test: 1 envelope 'Statement of Advice' → signed in DocuSignMock; 1 draft campaign 'TEST Campaign' in NewsletterBuilder (saved to localStorage newsletter_campaigns); 1 extra 'Strategy 3' added to SuperOptimiser in-memory
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 180 validated Phase 1 batch (Rockstar CRM + SuperOptimiser + SMSF + SimpleClientView). All acceptance criteria PASS with 0 page errors. Carry-over environmental noise unchanged: emergent-main.js DataCloneError/Failed-to-fetch spam (not app code). 2 non-blocking items: (1) Review Pack overlay covers Super tab action bar — medium priority UX z-index fix; (2) missing data-testid on 4 Compliance + 3 DocuSign stat cards — low priority testability. Super Optimiser Add Strategy works functionally (verified 2→3 via JS); the Playwright force-click failure was purely due to Review Pack overlay intercept, not a component bug.
rca of the issue: Add Strategy Playwright click-through issue: The Review Pack floating side panel (top-right, z-index higher than tab header) overlays the SuperOptimiser toolbar region. Playwright's pointer-event even with force=True is intercepted by the panel's click handler. Confirmed fix path: (a) dispatch a programmatic .click() via JS (works — strategies 2→3), or (b) dismiss the Review Pack (X button) before interacting with Super tab controls. For real users this is just a UX friction, not a functional bug. Recommended fix: lower Review Pack z-index when it overlaps action bars OR auto-minimize it when a client tab with its own toolbar is active.
